data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a 'Book Now' button on the Facebook page, which is a specific requirement outlined in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this button on the Facebook page. The absence of this critical evidence indicates a gap in meeting the requirement, as the exploratory step did not yield any confirmation of the button's presence or operational status.
gaps: 'Book Now' button on Facebook page is not confirmed to exist.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
